output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pr: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/reference/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?driver(AVG(?pos) AS ?avg_pos) WHERE {
  ?driver p:P1043 [ ps:P1043 ?pos ; pr:P248 wd:Q31707433 ] .
  ?driver p:P1043 [ ps:P1043 ?pos ; pr:P248 wd:Q3419271 ]
}
GROUP BY ?driver
ORDER BY ?avg_pos
LIMIT 5
output.formatted:
10

  ?driver p:P1043 [ ps:P1043 ?pos ; pr:P248 wd:Q3419271 ]
}
GROUP BY ?driver
ORDER BY ?avg_pos
